title: Tracing the Roots
observed_public_files: OpenReview supplement ZIP size 45,499,156 bytes; ZIP SHA-256 62e9ae3833bcc0f102612d05898262eea2b6025fe8949a72c3f055a8534c7b41; four public CIFAR10 diffusion-trajectory feature tensors under data/cifar10/train and data/cifar10/eval; tensor hashes match replay JSON; replayed AUC 0.815826, accuracy 0.7375, TPR@1%FPR 0.134, TPR@0.1%FPR 0.038
consumer_question: Can this public feature-packet-only evidence serve as a provenance-limited E2 false-promotion review row without being counted as N50 denominator evidence?
first_blocker: Missing raw target checkpoint identity and raw sample IDs; the packet binds tensor roles and metrics, not raw target/sample provenance.
notes: Usable as bounded Research-side feature-packet evidence for a false-promotion review row only. CCF-A wording risk is material if it is presented as an external benchmark, N50 denominator row, black-box response benchmark, Platform/Runtime admitted row, or fully raw-asset-reproducible result.
